articles.title: Sainthia (SC) Election Result 2026 Live: Vote Counting Begins at 8 AM, Stay Tuned for Latest Win Loss Tally Here!
articles.description:
Sainthia (SC) Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE:

Catch latest win-loss tally and vote counting updates from West Bengal Election 2026 here. Sainthia (SC) constituency number 289 of West Bengal, was won by Nilabati Saha in 2021 from TMC who secured 110572 votes. In 2021, the runner up candidate was, Piya Saha from BJP who secured 95329 votes. Winning margin for this seat in 2021 elections was 15243 votes.
Vote counting of Assembly elections 2026 will be held today, 4 May 2026 from 8 AM onwards. Catch latest updates on ABP Live for all details on vote counting, win loss tally and final seats won by each party.

Follow ABP LIVE TV and ABP News YouTube for all latest action around Sainthia (SC) Election 2023 LIVE vote counting.

articles.title: In past 8 yrs, 1.2k minors were sexually abused, and 13% got pregnant: Goa VAU
articles.description: Shocking data from Goa's victim assistance unit reveals 13% of sexually abused minor girls became pregnant over eight years. Teen pregnancies are most common among 16-18 year olds. Experts stress early, consistent education from trusted adults, starting in Class V, to combat this alarming trend and protect vulnerable youth.

articles.title: Trump's Iran disaster hands Putin big win: EU reels with weeks of fuel left, Hormuz hell unleashed?
articles.description: Russia capitalizes on the global energy shock triggered by tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, expanding oil exports across Asia and regaining influence in Europe. As prices surge and supplies tighten, Vladimir Putin emerges as a key beneficiary while Donald Trump faces criticism over the Iran strategy’s global fallout. With the European Union scrambling for fuel and Asian demand rising, the crisis is reshaping global energy markets and geopolitical alliances.

articles.title: Kerala assembly elections 2026: From Peravoor, Dharmadam to Palakkad, top 10 seats to watch out
articles.description: Kerala's political fate hangs in the balance as vote counting for the April 9 Assembly elections begins. The ruling LDF, opposition UDF, and BJP-led NDA are vying for dominance in a high-stakes contest. Exit polls suggest a close fight, with the UDF aiming to unseat the LDF after a decade.

articles.title: Assam assembly elections 2026: From Jalukbari, Jorhat to Kaliabor, here are top 10 seats to watch out
articles.description: Assam assembly elections key seats: The final stage of the Assam election battle arrives with vote counting on Monday. This will decide if the BJP-led NDA secures a third term or if the Congress returns to power. The fates of 722 candidates from 126 constituencies are sealed in EVMs. Counting will occur at 40 centres across all 35 districts under tight security.

articles.title: Puducherry assembly elections 2026: From Thattanchavady to Mangalam, here are top 10 seats to watch out
articles.description: Puducherry's 2026 Assembly elections are a tight race with a record 89.83% voter turnout. Exit polls project a victory for the AINRC-led NDA, though actor Vijay's TVK is also in contention. Key constituencies feature high-profile candidates, including the incumbent CM and former CM, in closely watched contests.
